signals.headline: South Korea's Annual Inflation Rises to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's Annual Inflation Rises to 2.2% in March 2026 | YES | MED confidence**  
This marks the first uptick after holding at 2.0% in January and February 2026, exceeding the Bank of Korea's 2% target but below market forecasts of 2.4%, potentially influencing prediction markets on rate cuts or currency stability[2][1].  
The data, from Trading Economics, reflects contained price pressures am
